titleStmt.title: SII 26.484: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 484. (A.R. No. 461 of 1909.) ŚUTTAMALLI, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete at the end.

It is a copy of the order of the king dealt with under No. 483 above. But here the king is stated to be seated on the seat called Paḷḷippīḍam Muṉaiyadaraiyaṉ in the hall of the sleeping apartment in the temple at Māḍakkuḷakkīḻ Madurai.
The signatories here were Uḍaiyāṉ of Kaṟkuṟuchchi in Tiruvaḻudi-vaḷanāḍu and Tērpoliyaniṉṟāṉ Vaḻudināṭṭu Mūvēndavēḷāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu
3 100000 5 10000 7 1000 śrīmā
ṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturai
kkoyil paḷḷiaṟaik kūṭat
tu paḷḷippiṭam muṉaiyataraiya
ṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu mel vem
panāṭṭuc cuttamaliyāṉa viraviṉo
taccaturvvetimaṅkalattu pakavatiśva
ramuṭaiyār koyilil śrīkāriyañ ce
yvāṉum tevarkaṉmiyuñ ceyyat tiru
vāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi . Ittevaṟ
kut tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇ
ṭu nivantaṅkaḻukku Antarāyam Uṭpa
ṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Iṟup
patāka muḷḷināṭṭu rājarājacaturvve
timaṅkalattuk kār pacāṉam viḷaiyu
m nilattu Aṅkavaijyaril śrīval
lavasavaṉātarāyar jivitamāṉa nila
ttilivarai jivitam tavirttu Ivvū
ril kaṭamai Iṟukkuṅ kolāl pa
ttu mā nilam Eḻāvatu pacāṉa mutal
Antarāya muṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟai
yiliyāka Iṭṭu variyilāreḻuttiṭṭa U
ḷvariyum nammolaiyuntarac co
ṉṉom tittavar celvatā
ka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭivittuk
koḷka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷi
ṉār . Ivai tiruvaḻutivaḷanāṭṭu kaṟkuṟiccivu
ṭaiyāṉeṉ terpoliyaniṉṟā
ṉāṉa vaḻutināṭṭu muventaveḷāṉe
Digital edition of SII 26.484 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
